counterintelligence.def: 反情報、反間諜人物 (單數) (諜)
counterintelligence.ex: He is an expert in counterintelligence.

countermand.def: 取消、撤回、發出撤銷令的人的人人物 (單數) (撤)
countermand.ex: The general decided to countermand order.

countermeasure.def: 對策、反制措施人物 (單數) (對)
countermeasure.ex: We need a strong preventive countermeasure.

countermove.def: 對抗動作、反擊人物、反擊的人的人人物 (單數) (反)

counteroffensive.def: 反攻人物、反攻的人的人人物 (單數) (攻)

counterpane.ex: She spread a silk counterpane on bed.

counterpart.def: 相對應的人、對應的人物 (單數) (應)
counterpart.ex: He met with his foreign counterpart.

counterplot.def: 對抗計畫、反間計人物、設反間計的人的人人物 (單數) (計)
counterplot.ex: They are devising a clever counterplot.

counterpoint.def: (樂)對位法、對比的人物、對位的人的人人物 (單數) (對)

counterpoise.def: 平衡、抵消的人物、平衡的人的人人物 (單數) (平)
counterpoise.ex: The weights act as an exact counterpoise.

counterproductive.def: 產生相反效果的人的人的人物 (負)

counterpunch.def: 反擊拳人物、反擊的人的人人物 (單數) (擊)
counterpunch.ex: He landed a sharp and fast counterpunch.

counterreformation.ex: The Counter-Reformation was a big move.

countersign.def: 連署、暗號、口令的人的人人物 (單數) (署)
countersign.ex: The guard asked him for countersign.

countersignature.def: 副署、連署的人物 (單數) (署)

countersink.def: 埋頭鑽、沉心孔的人的人人物 (單數) (鑽)
countersink.ex: He used a local countersink screw tonight.

counterspy.def: 反間諜、抓間諜的人人物 (單數) (諜)
counterspy.ex: The secret counterspy was working hard.

countertenor.def: (樂)最高男低音、男高音人物 (單數) (唱)

countervail.def: 抵銷、補償、對抗的人的人
countervail.ex: We must countervail his evil influence.

counterweight.def: 平衡力、平衡物人物 (單數) (平)
counterweight.ex: The lift uses a massive counterweight.

countess.def: 伯爵夫人、女伯爵人物 (單數) (爵)
countess.ex: The royal countess attended the ball.

counting.ex: She tried counting sheep to fall asleep.

countless.def: 無數的人的人人物 (單數) (多)
countless.ex: There are countless stars in the sky.

countrified/countryfied.ex: He spoke with a very countrified accent.

country.def: 國家、農村、鄉下、故鄉的人的人物 (單數) (國)
country.col: developing country, country music, across the country
country.ex: China is a very large developing country.

countryman.def: 同胞、鄉下人人物 (單數) (胞)
countryman.ex: He met a fellow countryman in Paris.

countryside.def: 農村、郊外、鄉下人物 (單數) (村)
countryside.ex: We spent a day in the beautiful countryside.

countrywide.def: 全國性的人的人人物 (單數) (展)
countrywide.ex: The police launched a countrywide search.

county.def: 縣、郡、郡政府的人物 (單數) (縣)
county.ex: The county court is in the city center.

coup.def: 政變、意料之外的打擊、成功人物 (單數) (變)
coup.ex: The military coup took place in the night.

coupe.def: (汽)轎跑車、雙座轎車人物 (單數) (車)
coupe.ex: He drives a very fast and sporty coupe.

couple.def: 一對、夫婦、連結、接合的人的人人物 (單數) (對)
couple.col: young couple, couple of, power couple
couple.ex: The young couple got married today.

couplet.ex: The poem ends with a rhyming couplet.

coupling.def: 接合、聯結器人物 (單數) (結)
coupling.ex: Tight coupling can be a bad design rule.

coupon.def: 贈券、息票、回條、票證人物 (單數) (券)
coupon.ex: I have a discount coupon for this shop.

courage.col: show courage, pluck up courage (鼓起勇氣)
courage.ex: He showed great courage in the fight.

courageous.ex: That was a very bold and courageous act.

courier.def: 信差、快遞員、導遊人物 (單數) (遞)
courier.ex: The courier delivered the box today.

course.def: 課程、過程、路線、一道菜的人物 (單數) (程)
course.col: of course, in the course of, golf course, main course
course.ex: Of course I will help you with project.

courser.ex: The swift courser galloped over hill.

court.def: 法庭、球場、朝廷、討好的人的人人物 (單數) (庭)
court.col: supreme court, tennis court, hold court, in court
court.ex: The case will be heard in court today.

courteous.ex: The staff provided very courteous service.

courteously.ex: He replied courteously to her question.

courtesan.ex: She was a famous courtesan of palace.

courtesy.def: 禮貌、好意、恩惠、蒙...之賜的人物 (單數) (禮)
courtesy.col: courtesy bus, out of courtesy, by courtesy of
courtesy.ex: He helped her out of simple courtesy.
